claims.summary: The gap between `structural_integrity` and `structural_strain_gap` can hide whether heaviness is self-friction or relational friction.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `mutual_resonance_tension` to Minime's `ViscosityVector` so co-occurring strain plus volatile shadow texture is visible separately from integrity and raw strain.

claims.summary: `residual_ghost_weight` should be compared with `shadow_volatility` during high-entropy cascades to see whether ghost weight is lagging or predictive.
claims.rationale: Existing `viscosity_vector_exports_shadow_volatility_without_control_authority` and residual ghost-weight regressions keep both fields visible; this run added the relational-tension regression as the next read-only comparison layer.

claims.summary: Stress-testing pressure/porosity by intentionally increasing restless shadow texture would touch live substrate/control behavior.
claims.rationale: Intentional live restless-texture pressure probes remain Tier 5 operator work. The safe current path is read-only telemetry plus explicit approval before changing pressure, porosity, PI, controller, or shadow-influence behavior.
